page_content:
EDCI822 Seminar in Secondary Education (3 Credits)

EDCI888 Apprenticeship in Education (1-8 Credits) Apprentice practice under professional supervision. Credit not to be granted for experience accrued prior to registration. Open only to degree- and certiﬁcate-seeking graduate students. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching, Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

EDCI889 Internship in Education (3-8 Credits) Internship experiences with appropriate supervision. Credit not to be granted for experience accrued prior to registration. Open only to students advanced to candidacy for doctoral degree. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching, Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
